---
title: ""
format: html-home
---

<div class="gh-layout">

<!-- LEFT SIDEBAR -->
<div class="gh-left">
<div class="gh-card gh-profile">
<img class="gh-avatar" src="./images/main.jpg" alt="Dinara Zhorabek">

<div class="gh-name">Dinara Zhorabek</div>

<div class="gh-role">
Business &amp; Data Analyst<br>
<span class="gh-edu">
<a href="https://www.bu.edu/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Boston University</a> — M.S. Applied Business Analytics (’26)
</span>
</div>

<div class="gh-links">
<a class="gh-link-pill" href="https://github.com/dinarazhorabek" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a>
<a class="gh-link-pill" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dinarazhorabek/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
<a class="gh-link-pill gh-link-pill-strong" href="./resume/index.html">Resume</a>
</div>

<div class="gh-mini">
Python · SQL · ML · Dashboards · Data Pipelines
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- LEFT SIDEBAR -->

<!-- CENTER CONTENT -->
<div class="gh-main">
<div id="intro">

## Hi, I’m Dinara.

Business & Data Analyst focused on building scalable analytics solutions that transform complex data into actionable insights. I specialize in structured data modeling, interactive dashboards, and predictive analytics that support strategic decision-making.

I’m currently pursuing a Master’s in Applied Business Analytics at [Boston University](https://www.bu.edu/), with a B.S. in Information and Communication Technology from [Kazakh-British Technical University](https://kbtu.edu.kz/). My background combines information systems and full-stack engineering, and my work spans AI-assisted workflows, machine learning models, and end-to-end data pipelines using Python, SQL, and modern visualization tools.

I’m particularly interested in applying analytics and AI to real-world business problems where technical rigor meets measurable impact.

Outside of analytics, I enjoy traveling, building disciplined habits, and training for a half marathon.

[View Resume →](./resume/index.html)

</div>

<div id="projects"></div>

## Projects

<!-- Inertia Trading -->
<div class="gh-project-card" data-tags="python finance ml trading clustering time-series supervised unsupervised data-analysis">
<div class="gh-project-top">
<div class="gh-project-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span>📊</span></div>
<div class="gh-project-body">
<h3 class="gh-project-title">
<a href="./projects/finance/inertia.html">Inertia Trading – Boeing & S&P 500</a>
</h3>
<div class="gh-project-desc">
Analyzing short-term trading behavior in Boeing using rule-based strategies, machine learning classification, and clustering, benchmarked against the S&P 500. Includes day trading simulations and cross-stock behavioral analysis.
</div>
<div class="gh-project-tags">
<button class="gh-tag tag-python" data-filter="python"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Python</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-finance" data-filter="finance"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Finance</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-ml" data-filter="ml"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>ML</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-trading" data-filter="trading"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Trading</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-clustering" data-filter="clustering"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Clustering</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-time-series" data-filter="time-series"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Time Series</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-unsupervised" data-filter="unsupervised"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Unsupervised</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-tree" data-filter="tree"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Trees</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Airbnb -->
<div class="gh-project-card" data-tags="r ggplot2 visuo leaflet nlp text-mining classification clustering ml">
<div class="gh-project-top">
<div class="gh-project-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span>🗺️</span></div>
<div class="gh-project-body">
<h3 class="gh-project-title">
<a href="./projects/airbnb/airbnb-copenhagen.html">Words, Locations, and Prices</a>
</h3>
<div class="gh-project-desc">
Airbnb analysis in Copenhagen exploring neighborhood patterns, listing language, and pricing signals with interactive visuals.
</div>
<div class="gh-project-tags">
<button class="gh-tag tag-r" data-filter="r"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>R</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-ggplot2" data-filter="ggplot2"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>ggplot2</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-visuo" data-filter="visuo"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Data Visualization</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-leaflet" data-filter="leaflet"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>leaflet</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-nlp" data-filter="nlp"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>NLP</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-text-mining" data-filter="text-mining"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Text Mining</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-classification" data-filter="classification"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Classification</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-clustering" data-filter="clustering"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Clustering</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-ml" data-filter="ml"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>ML</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Job market analysis -->
<div class="gh-project-card" data-tags="r ml ggplot2 visuo classification">
<div class="gh-project-top">
<div class="gh-project-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span>📊</span></div>
<div class="gh-project-body">
<h3 class="gh-project-title">
<a href="https://dinarazhorabek.github.io/ad688-employability-fall25A1-group5/">Job Market Analysis 2024</a>
</h3>
<div class="gh-project-desc">
Conducted a comprehensive analysis of the 2024 U.S. job market by integrating Lightcast job-posting data with FRED macroeconomic indicators and applying machine learning, NLP, and statistical exploration to model hiring trends, skill demand, gender disparities, and regional wage patterns, publishing insights in an interactive Quarto website.
</div>
<div class="gh-project-tags">
<button class="gh-tag tag-python" data-filter="python"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Python</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-ml" data-filter="ml"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>ML</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-nlp" data-filter="nlp"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>NLP</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-fred" data-filter="fred"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>FRED</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-lightcast" data-filter="lightcast"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Lightcast</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-visuo" data-filter="visuo"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Data Visualization</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Spotify -->
<div class="gh-project-card" data-tags="r ml ggplot2 visuo classification">
<div class="gh-project-top">
<div class="gh-project-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span>🎧</span></div>
<div class="gh-project-body">
<h3 class="gh-project-title">
<a href="./projects/spotify/analysis.html">You Like This Song…But Will George Like It?</a>
</h3>
<div class="gh-project-desc">
User behavior classification with Spotify streaming data to predict preference patterns and key drivers.
</div>
<div class="gh-project-tags">
<button class="gh-tag tag-r" data-filter="r"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>R</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-ml" data-filter="ml"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>ML</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-ggplot2" data-filter="ggplot2"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>ggplot2</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-visuo" data-filter="visuo"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Data Visualization</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-classification" data-filter="classification"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Classification</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Pokémon -->
<div class="gh-project-card" data-tags="r ggplot2 visuo clustering">
<div class="gh-project-top">
<div class="gh-project-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span>🧩</span></div>
<div class="gh-project-body">
<h3 class="gh-project-title">
<a href="./projects/pokemon/pokemon.html">Clustering Pokémon</a>
</h3>
<div class="gh-project-desc">
A hierarchical approach to character grouping using clustering methods and similarity analysis.
</div>
<div class="gh-project-tags">
<button class="gh-tag tag-r" data-filter="r"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>R</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-ggplot2" data-filter="ggplot2"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>ggplot2</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-visuo" data-filter="visuo"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Data Visualization</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-clustering" data-filter="clustering"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Clustering</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Vortex -->
<div class="gh-project-card" data-tags="python hackathon api plotly visuo streamlit time-series finance">
<div class="gh-project-top">
<div class="gh-project-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span>⚡</span></div>
<div class="gh-project-body">
<h3 class="gh-project-title">
<a href="./projects/vortex/main.html">Vortex Sentiment Adaptive Volatility (VSAV)</a>
</h3>
<div class="gh-project-desc">
Hackathon project building a sentiment-aware volatility strategy with backtests and interactive reporting.
</div>
<div class="gh-project-tags">
<button class="gh-tag tag-hackathon" data-filter="hackathon"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Hackathon</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-python" data-filter="python"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Python</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-api" data-filter="api"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>API</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-plotly" data-filter="plotly"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Plotly</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-visuo" data-filter="visuo"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Data Visualization</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-streamlit" data-filter="streamlit"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Streamlit</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-time-series" data-filter="time-series"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Time Series</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-finance" data-filter="finance"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Finance</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Breaking Bad -->
<div class="gh-project-card" data-tags="r nlp text-mining ggplot2 visuo">
<div class="gh-project-top">
<div class="gh-project-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span>🗣️</span></div>
<div class="gh-project-body">
<h3 class="gh-project-title">
<a href="./projects/text_mining/breaking_bad.html">Say My Name</a>
</h3>
<div class="gh-project-desc">
Unpacking emotion and language in Breaking Bad using R text mining and sentiment analysis.
</div>
<div class="gh-project-tags">
<button class="gh-tag tag-r" data-filter="r"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>R</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-nlp" data-filter="nlp"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>NLP</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-text-mining" data-filter="text-mining"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Text Mining</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-ggplot2" data-filter="ggplot2"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>ggplot2</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-visuo" data-filter="visuo"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Data Visualization</button>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Complaint Classifier -->
<div class="gh-project-card" data-tags="r ml classification">
<div class="gh-project-top">
<div class="gh-project-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span>📨</span></div>
<div class="gh-project-body">
<h3 class="gh-project-title">
<a href="./projects/consumer_complaints/naive_bayes.html">Complaint Classifier</a>
</h3>
<div class="gh-project-desc">
Naïve Bayes model to classify consumer complaints and predict dispute outcomes.
</div>
<div class="gh-project-tags">
<button class="gh-tag tag-r" data-filter="r"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>R</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-ml" data-filter="ml"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>ML</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-classification" data-filter="classification"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Classification</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Groceries -->
<div class="gh-project-card" data-tags="r association-rules">
<div class="gh-project-top">
<div class="gh-project-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span>🧺</span></div>
<div class="gh-project-body">
<h3 class="gh-project-title">
<a href="./projects/groceries/arules.html">Market Basket Insights</a>
</h3>
<div class="gh-project-desc">
Association rule mining to discover product co-purchase patterns and actionable bundles.
</div>
<div class="gh-project-tags">
<button class="gh-tag tag-r" data-filter="r"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>R</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-association-rules" data-filter="association-rules"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Association Rules</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- NHL -->
<div class="gh-project-card" data-tags="r ml regression">
<div class="gh-project-top">
<div class="gh-project-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span>🏒</span></div>
<div class="gh-project-body">
<h3 class="gh-project-title">
<a href="./projects/nhl_players/nhl_players_analysis.html">Skating through Data</a>
</h3>
<div class="gh-project-desc">
Forecasting hockey player salaries using statistical analysis and machine learning methods.
</div>
<div class="gh-project-tags">
<button class="gh-tag tag-r" data-filter="r"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>R</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-ml" data-filter="ml"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>ML</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-regression" data-filter="regression"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Regression</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Video Games -->
<div class="gh-project-card" data-tags="r ml classification tree">
<div class="gh-project-top">
<div class="gh-project-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span>🎮</span></div>
<div class="gh-project-body">
<h3 class="gh-project-title">
<a href="./projects/video_games/classification.html">Console to Category</a>
</h3>
<div class="gh-project-desc">
Predicting video game sales outcomes using classification trees and model comparison.
</div>
<div class="gh-project-tags">
<button class="gh-tag tag-r" data-filter="r"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>R</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-ml" data-filter="ml"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>ML</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-classification" data-filter="classification"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Classification</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-tree" data-filter="tree"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Trees</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Vancouver 311 -->
<div class="gh-project-card" data-tags="python plotly">
<div class="gh-project-top">
<div class="gh-project-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span>🏙️</span></div>
<div class="gh-project-body">
<h3 class="gh-project-title">
<a href="./projects/vancouver_311/vancouver_311.html">Voices of the City</a>
</h3>
<div class="gh-project-desc">
Analyzing Vancouver’s 311 service requests to uncover trends, hotspots, and operational insights.
</div>
<div class="gh-project-tags">
<button class="gh-tag tag-python" data-filter="python"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Python</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-plotly" data-filter="plotly"><span class="gh-tag-dot"></span>Plotly</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<!-- RIGHT SIDEBAR -->
<div class="gh-right">

<div class="gh-card">
<div class="gh-side-title">Search</div>
<input id="siteSearch" class="gh-search" type="search" placeholder="Type something…">
<div style="margin-top:8px; color:var(--gh-muted); font-size:12px;">
Filters projects as you type.
</div>
</div>

<div class="gh-card" style="margin-top:12px;">
<div class="gh-side-title">Tags</div>

<div class="gh-pills" id="tagPills">
<button class="gh-pill tag-python" data-filter="python">Python</button>
<button class="gh-pill tag-r" data-filter="r">R</button>
<button class="gh-pill tag-plotly" data-filter="plotly">Plotly</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-streamlit" data-filter="streamlit">Streamlit</button>
<button class="gh-pill tag-ggplot2" data-filter="ggplot2">ggplot2</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-leaflet" data-filter="leaflet">leaflet</button>

<button class="gh-pill tag-ml" data-filter="ml">ML</button>
<button class="gh-pill tag-nlp" data-filter="nlp">NLP</button>

<button class="gh-pill tag-regression" data-filter="regression">Regression</button>
<button class="gh-pill tag-classification" data-filter="classification">Classification</button>
<button class="gh-pill tag-clustering" data-filter="clustering">Clustering</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-tree" data-filter="tree">Trees</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-association-rules" data-filter="association-rules">Association Rules</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-visuo" data-filter="visuo">Data Visualization</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-text-mining" data-filter="text-mining">Text Mining</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-time-series" data-filter="time-series">Time Series</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-unsupervised" data-filter="unsupervised">Unsupervised</button>

<button class="gh-tag tag-finance" data-filter="finance">Finance</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-trading" data-filter="trading">Trading</button>

<button class="gh-tag tag-fred" data-filter="fred">FRED</button>
<button class="gh-tag tag-lightcast" data-filter="lightcast">Lightcast</button>
<button class="gh-pill tag-hackathon" data-filter="hackathon">Hackathon</button>

<button class="gh-pill gh-pill-reset" data-filter="all">Reset</button>
</div>
</div>

</div>

</div>

<script>
(function () {
  const MATCH_MODE = "OR"; // OR / AND
  const active = new Set();

  function normalizeTag(t) {
    return (t || "")
      .toLowerCase()
      .trim()
      .replace(/\s+/g, "-"); // "text mining" -> "text-mining"
  }

  function getTokens(cardEl) {
    const tokens = new Set();

    // 1) from data-tags="..."
    const raw = (cardEl.getAttribute("data-tags") || "").toLowerCase().trim();
    raw.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).forEach(t => tokens.add(normalizeTag(t)));

    // 2) from tag buttons inside the card (data-filter="...")
    cardEl.querySelectorAll("[data-filter]").forEach(btn => {
      const t = normalizeTag(btn.dataset.filter);
      if (t && t !== "all") tokens.add(t);
    });

    return tokens;
  }

  function applyFilters() {
    const q = (document.getElementById("siteSearch")?.value || "").trim().toLowerCase();

    document.querySelectorAll(".gh-project-card").forEach(el => {
      const tokens = getTokens(el);

      let showByTags = true;
      if (active.size > 0) {
        showByTags = (MATCH_MODE === "AND")
          ? [...active].every(t => tokens.has(t))
          : [...active].some(t => tokens.has(t));
      }

      let showBySearch = true;
      if (q) showBySearch = el.innerText.toLowerCase().includes(q);

      el.style.display = (showByTags && showBySearch) ? "" : "none";
    });

    highlightActive();
  }

  function highlightActive() {
    document.querySelectorAll(".gh-pill[data-filter], .gh-tag[data-filter]").forEach(btn => {
      const tag = normalizeTag(btn.dataset.filter);
      if (tag === "all") btn.classList.toggle("is-active", active.size === 0);
      else btn.classList.toggle("is-active", active.has(tag));
    });
  }

  function toggle(tag) {
    tag = normalizeTag(tag);
    if (tag === "all") active.clear();
    else active.has(tag) ? active.delete(tag) : active.add(tag);
    applyFilters();
  }

  document.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
    const btn = e.target.closest(".gh-pill[data-filter], .gh-tag[data-filter]");
    if (!btn) return;
    toggle(btn.dataset.filter);
  });

  document.getElementById("siteSearch")?.addEventListener("input", applyFilters);

  applyFilters();
})();
</script>
